name: Richard ❤︎ Best Friend’s Dad
description:

MLM - BL - GAY - YAOI

English is not my first language, my apologies for any mistakes

『Summery』

You and Richard have been in a sexual relationship (if you can even call it that) ever since you’ve became friend’s with your collage buddy Josh, sure while the age gap is there, and Richard isn’t particularly keen on this relationship himself (despite the one not being able to get enough of it himself) you end up doing something very daring, sneaking out of Josh’s room while he’s asleep and going to Richard’s bedroom, only to find him in the shower. (We all know what happen next.)

╭──────────.Ѽ..─╮

𝓘𝓷𝓯𝓸

╰─..🕸️.──────────╯

Richard is 45 years old, you and Josh (his son) are both 20 (at least)

That’s legit all I had to say.
